data.name: Reclaim the Fame
data.detailed_description:
Runways, Romance, and Action

An adult visual novel where you step into the high heels of two very different young women as they navigate the cutthroat world of fashion and the dangerous underbelly of the entertainment industry. This is not just a story about designing clothes; it’s a cinematic mash-up of comedy, action, and adventure, filled with tons of still-image renders, animations, mini-games and more...

The Story

Natalie Evans is hustling to make her mark. A fashion design student by day and a backstage worker by night, she lives a quiet life of pins, needles, and hard work. But when she crosses paths with Ethan Pierce, the entertainment industry’s most powerful and enigmatic mogul, everything changes...

Ashley Pierce lives life in the fast lane. As an 18-year-old fresh graduate living on her father’s dime, her biggest worry is usually what to wear. But privilege offers no protection when the shadows come out to play. In one chaotic night, Ashley’s perfect world is turned upside down, forcing her to trade luxury for survival.

Control both Natalie and Ashley as their fates intertwine. From the glitz of the runway to high-stakes action, can they survive the industry—and the danger that lurks behind the curtain?

data.short_description: An adult visual novel where you step into the shoes of two different young women in the world of fashion and the dangerous underbelly of the entertainment industry as a cinematic mash-up of comedy, action, and adventure, filled with tons of still-image renders, animations, mini-games and more...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.4 GHz
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 950, Radeon R7 360, or Intel HD Graphics 630
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
